Rhineland Mysticism is a [[Hydroplane]] where [[genki]] is denied and instead self negation and inner conflict rather than self affirmation are seen as central to spirituality<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW6djxNs270</ref>

Emptying yourself from your desires to allow an external God to fill you up with [[agape]] rather than inheriting agape from the [[alpha]].<ref name=":0" />

It is a [[Self disconnector]].<ref name=":0" />

It has a second element where the will of [[god]] rather than the [[agape]] of God is what creates the world.<ref name=":0" />

== See Also ==

* [[Neo-Calvinism]]

== References ==
[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Rhineland Mysticism]][[sn:Rhineland Mysticism]][[Category:Self-disconnectors]]
[[Category:Pages]]
